sizing_rule.note: When reinvesting profits, convert AHPR to GHPR using formula GHPR = (AHPR^2 - V)^(1/2) before determining optimal f position sizing on efficient frontier. Applies specifically to reinvestment scenarios where geometric mean is more appropriate than arithmetic mean for compounding capital.

source_rule_text: When reinvesting profits back into a trading program, use geometric average HPR instead of arithmetic average HPR to determine position sizing on the efficient frontier.
